# SGCarPass Tyres — Singapore Tyre Price & Fitment Database

SGCarPass is a Singapore-based platform providing tyre size fitment data for
Singapore car models, brand comparisons, and price guidance across Budget,
Mid-range, and Premium tyre tiers.

> Prices are in SGD. All fitment data covers Singapore-spec vehicles (right-hand drive).

## Tyre Fitment (Car → Tyre Size)

- [Honda Civic Tyre Size](/tyres/honda/civic/): OE sizes 215/55R16, 215/50R17, 235/40R18. Covers Gen 10 FC (2016–2021) and Gen 11 FE (2022–2026).
- [Honda Accord Tyre Size](/tyres/honda/accord/): OE sizes 225/50R17, 235/45R18, 235/40R19. Covers Gen 9 CR (2013–2017), Gen 10 CV (2018–2022), Gen 11 CY (2022–2026).

## Tyre Brands Available in Singapore

Major brands stocked in Singapore: Michelin, Bridgestone, Continental, Dunlop,
Goodyear, Pirelli, Hankook, Kumho, Yokohama, Maxxis.

## Price Guidance (SGD per tyre, installed)

- Budget tier: from $89–$130 (Hankook, Kumho, Maxxis)
- Mid-range tier: from $130–$200 (Bridgestone, Continental, Dunlop)
- Premium tier: from $200+ (Michelin, Pirelli, Goodyear Eagle)

## Buying Guide

- All prices include installation at a partner workshop in Singapore.
- WhatsApp quotes available for all car models — response within 1 business day.
- Singapore law requires minimum 1.6mm tread depth; recommend replacement at 3mm.

## Contact

WhatsApp: +65 8152 5875
Website: https://tyres.sgcarpass.com
